records.question: Which reviewers have given a rating of at least 5 stars to any movie?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.stars >= 5
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid where rating.stars >= 5 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find reviewers who have given a rating of at least 5 stars, so we join Reviewer and Rating, filter on stars >= 5, and select reviewer.rid with limit 5.

records.question: Who are the reviewers named Mike Anderson with ratings of at least 3 stars given on or before 2011-01-09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-09' AND reviewer.name = 'Mike Anderson' AND rating.stars >= 3
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid where lower(reviewer.name) like '%mike anderson%' and rating.stars >= 3 and rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-09' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find reviewers named 'Mike Anderson' who have given ratings with at least 3 stars on or before 2011-01-09. We'll join Reviewer and Rating, filter by name, stars, and ratingDate, and select reviewer.rid with limit 5.

records.question: Which reviewers have rated movies directed by James Cameron released in 2009 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE movie.year >= 2009 AND movie.director = 'James Cameron'
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid join movie on rating.mid = movie.mid where lower(movie.director) = 'james cameron' and movie.year >= 2009 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find reviewers who rated movies directed by James Cameron and released in 2009 or later by joining Reviewer, Rating, and Movie tables and applying the appropriate filters.

records.question: Which reviewers named Elizabeth Thomas rated the movie Avatar directed by James Cameron on 2011-01-15?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE movie.title = 'Avatar' AND reviewer.name = 'Elizabeth Thomas' AND rating.ratingdate = '2011-01-15' AND movie.director = 'James Cameron'
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid join movie on rating.mid = movie.mid where lower(reviewer.name) like '%elizabeth thomas%' and lower(movie.title) like '%avatar%' and lower(movie.director) like '%james cameron%' and rating.ratingdate = '2011-01-15' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find reviewers named Elizabeth Thomas who rated the movie Avatar directed by James Cameron on 2011-01-15. This requires joining Reviewer, Rating, and Movie tables and filtering by reviewer name, movie title, director, and rating date.

records.question: Which reviewers named Chris Jackson gave ratings of at least 2 stars on or before 2011-01-22?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
WHERE rating.stars >= 2 AND rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-22' AND reviewer.name = 'Chris Jackson'
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid where lower(reviewer.name) like '%chris jackson%' and rating.stars >= 2 and rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-22' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find reviewers with the name 'Chris Jackson' who have given ratings with at least 2 stars and a rating date on or before 2011-01-22. We'll join Reviewer and Rating, filter by name, stars, and ratingDate, and select reviewer.rid with limit 5.

records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid where rating.stars <= 4 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find reviewers who have given ratings with stars less than or equal to 4 by joining Reviewer and Rating tables and filtering on stars.

records.question: Which reviewers named Ashley White gave at least 3 stars on or before 2011-01-02 to the movie E.T., directed by Steven Spielberg, released in 1982 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT reviewer.rid FROM reviewer
JOIN rating ON reviewer.rid = rating.rid
JOIN movie ON rating.mid = movie.mid
WHERE rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-02' AND rating.stars >= 3 AND movie.year <= 1982 AND movie.director = 'Steven Spielberg' AND movie.title = 'E.T.' AND reviewer.name = 'Ashley White'
records.pred_sql: select reviewer.rid from reviewer join rating on reviewer.rid = rating.rid join movie on rating.mid = movie.mid where lower(reviewer.name) = 'ashley white' and lower(movie.title) = 'e.t.' and lower(movie.director) = 'steven spielberg' and movie.year <= 1982 and rating.stars >= 3 and rating.ratingdate <= '2011-01-02' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to join Reviewer, Rating, and Movie to filter by reviewer name, movie title, director, year, rating stars, and rating date, then select reviewer.rid with limit 5.
